title: EoE A different blood stain on the moon
display_title: EoE A different blood stain on the moon
wikitext:
[]: EoE: A different blood stain on the moon?             Quote Post by deeRez » Sun Jan 29, 2012 10:15 pm Edit: Ignore this thread. I missed the first blood stain from the neck: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Mon Jan 30, 2012 1:19 am Silly Space Gravity.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Mon Jan 30, 2012 2:03 am The stain is in the sky, not one the moon's surface, is it not?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 30, 2012 3:35 am ReiAyanami25 wrote: The stain is in the sky, not one the moon's surface, is it not?

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Jan 31, 2012 2:43 am Ornette wrote: Watch it again, it shows you the blood hitting the moon's surface in this screenshot:

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Jan 31, 2012 9:07 pm Do we know for a fact that it's hitting the moon? I could never make sense out of that shot.

[]:             Quote Post by Henry Spencer » Wed Apr 25, 2012 8:26 pm Rodeo wrote: Do we know for a fact that it's hitting the moon? I could never make sense out of that shot.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu Apr 26, 2012 7:19 am Henry Spencer wrote: It looks like that's the case in that third-to-last picture. In addition, so much of Lilith's blood spurted out that it's more than likely it reached the moon's surface.
